'''Fahraark''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] associate of [[Dayla Kev]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Along with his fellow Wookiee [[Friyahrr]], Fahraark shipped a group of [[Hoojib/Legends|Hoojibs]] to ''[[Galactic Horizon]]'' to help in Dayla's revenge on [[Milac Troper]].<ref name="GC6" />
